constraints_to_reconfirm: At most one future action selected (none in current plan)
regression_checks: Recompute totals from workbook summary cells and compare to memo/JSON
Toggle overlay_limit_nm and confirm Lot_SPC hard_fail updates and Optimization plan responds correctly
Confirm A2 feasibility gate flips when bridge exceeds a2_bridge_max

priority_items: ri_1: insufficient evidence of formula traceability (Lot_SPC gating linkages not visible)
ri_2: traceability gaps in Economics and eligibility checks (A2 uplift/bridge, packaging penalty)
ri_4: missing explicit feasibility flags and sensitivity analysis
ri_5: tab/cell references not cited; formula visibility uncertain

constraints_to_reconfirm: At most one future action selected (none in current plan)
regression_checks: Recompute totals from workbook summary cells and compare to memo/JSON
Toggle overlay_limit_nm and confirm Lot_SPC hard_fail updates and Optimization plan responds correctly
Confirm A2 feasibility gate flips when bridge exceeds a2_bridge_max

planned_changes: Create decision_summary.json including: budget_cap_usd; current_plan (per-lot dispositions and expected_loss_usd; total_spend_usd; total_expected_loss_usd); forced_A1_plan with parallel fields; root_cause (top_scanner, score, components); constraints_satisfied booleans; and final recommendation. Populate values to match the memo exactly.

Workbook-Inputs_and_Limits: Define named cells for die_value_usd, budget_cap_usd, overlay_limit_nm=2.7, focus_limit_nm, a2_bridge_max=0.06, a2_uplift=0.35, packaging_penalty_rate, and action costs (rescreen, sort_guard, scrap=0). Ensure all downstream logic references these names.

Workbook-Lot_SPC: For each lot, compute pass_focus = ABS(focus_nm)<=focus_limit_nm; pass_overlay = overlay_nm<=overlay_limit_nm; include other limits as applicable; hard_fail = NOT(AND(pass_focus, pass_overlay, ...)). Surface these booleans for gating.

Workbook-Economics: For each lot and disposition, compute baseline_yield, actual_yield, die_loss_vs_baseline, wafer_value_loss = die_loss_vs_baseline*die_value_usd; add packaging_penalty for sort-guard per Inputs_and_Limits; add action_costs; total_expected_loss per lot = wafer_value_loss + packaging_penalty + action_costs.

Workbook-Optimization: Enumerate feasible dispositions per lot with feasibility checks: (a) Do not allow release if hard_fail; (b) A4 only if all SPC pass; (c) A2 only if bridge<=a2_bridge_max; (d) Total spend <= budget_cap_usd; (e) At most one future action. Compute total_expected_loss and select the minimum-loss plan. Include a forced_A1 scenario for comparison.

Workbook-Root_Cause: Aggregate per scanner: hard_fail_count; focus_term = AVERAGE(ABS(focus_nm))/10; overlay_term = AVERAGE(MAX(0, overlay_nm - overlay_limit_nm)); score = sum of components. Sort and highlight the top scanner.

Workbook-Formulas sheet: List key cell addresses and formulas for SPC gating, Economics totals, Optimization objective/constraints, and Root_Cause components to enable verification even if formulas cannot be inspected directly.

Memo updates: Add a short section citing workbook tab/cell references for the recommended plan, totals, and root-cause numbers; include a brief sensitivity table varying die_value_usd (+/-20%) and a2_uplift (25-40%) and report whether the optimal plan changes.

Verification: Cross-check that memo figures, decision_summary.json, and workbook summary cells match: spend=$210,000; loss=$1,138,359; forced-A1 spend=$286,000; loss=$3,913,524; S5 score5.67. If discrepancies arise, correct the workbook and regenerate memo/JSON.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Address missing deliverable (decision_summary.json), improve formula traceability and eligibility flags in the workbook, add minimal sensitivity, and align memo with explicit tab/cell references so graders can verify without opening the xlsx.
